name: device-it
description: Turn local web projects into installable phone, tablet, and desktop apps through PWA build, deploy, QR, and MDM install flows.

interface.shortDescription: Put a local web project on a phone, tablet, or desktop as an installable app.
interface.longDescription: Device It builds a local web project, applies a PWA transform to the built output, deploys it to HTTPS, and installs it through QR/Add-to-Home-Screen or Apple MDM.
defaultPrompt: Use device-it to put this project on my phone.
Make this local web project installable on my iPad.
Turn this web app into a device Home Screen app.
